features: 🔥【Advanced Heating Technology】-- Our heated scarf features an integrated sensor to prevent burns. It instantly warms up within 3-5 seconds. It won't make your neck too hot, but will maintain a warm temperature. The internal heating elements are made of high-quality carbon fibers, which heat quickly, safely, steadily, and warmly.

❤️‍🔥【3 LEVELS of PRECISE TEMPERATURE CONTROL】--You need to press and hold the button for 2-3 seconds, and the heated neck pad with battery will start heating. Heated scarf has 3 adjustable heating settings (Red 65°C/145°F) - (Blue Color 55°C/130°F) - (Green 45°C/110°F) .Depending on the ambient temperature, you can easily to choose your love Temperature.

🔋【2025 UPGRADE BATTERY】--The 6000mah power bank made of Pure Ternary. So it is extremely small and lightweight,weighting only 0.225lb. And it has a long lifespan,very durable. Safe with Intelligent Circuit Protection. When charging the indicator light will flash, when all four lights are on and not flashing, is fully charged, can work 3-7 hours for our heated scarf.

💝【Ideal Gift for Family and Friends】-- This heated neck warmer for pain for shoulders will be a perfect gift for women, men, moms, dads who suffers from neck shoulder pain or Muscle Stiffness. The heated scarf can improve blood circulation and help relieve muscle pain. Send them a wearable heated scarf as a birthday gift, Valentine's Day gift, Christmas gift, Father's Day, Mother's Day, they will be happy and surprised.

👍【Buy with confidence - 6-month warranty included】-- So why wait? Experience the peace of mind that comes with our 6-month warranty. We stand behind the quality of our heated neck pad and are confident that you will be satisfied with your purchase. In the unlikely event that you encounter any issues with your heated scarf, our friendly customer support team is here to assist you. Just email us
